creator: riccardo@torrini.org
text:
Me too message, with a bit of info:

- before 13.2-p8 I have seen watchdog timeout probably not more than one per month, never looked for a fix
- machine is my home desktop, all others have Intel card
- I use powerd
- it happens during "restic" backup (so with probaly high bi-directional traffic)
- I have /home over NFSv3, nothing like this happens on last (10?) years
- I can confirm that only a reboot fix the missing ethernet driver
- I just added pkg (realtek-re-kmod-199.00_1 installed)

And finally a big thanks to ale@ for the port ;)
